name: Standard Chartered PLC
description: Standard Chartered PLC is a British multinational banking and financial services company headquartered in London. It operates a vast network across more than 50 markets, with a primary focus on Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. The bank provides a comprehensive range of services, including corporate and institutional banking, wealth management, and retail banking. By combining deep local expertise with global capabilities, Standard Chartered supports its clients in navigating complex financial landscapes, fostering sustainable growth, and delivering innovative solutions that connect diverse economies and communities across its extensive international footprint.
